case_title: ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. BRANDON MUNRO

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-23-2021 CONTINUED TO JUL-20-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MUNRO, BRANDON SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-28-2020

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNRO, BRANDON $1,862.44 PRINCIPAL, $265.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,128.39, SEE SCANNED DOC
